scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:shell
scripts.test:node: node ws-protocol.test.js && node helper.test.js && node browser-launcher.test.js && node auth.test.js && node server.test.js && node lifecycle.test.js
scripts.test:shell: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const winBash = 'C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe'; const bash = process.platform === 'win32' && existsSync(winBash) ? winBash : 'bash'; for (const script of ['start-server.test.sh', 'stop-server.test.sh']) { const result = spawnSync(bash, [script], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.error) { console.error(result.error.message); process.exit(1); } if (result.status !== 0) process.exit(result.status ?? 1); }"
